title: Gauges, Switches & Modules
description: An unofficial NeoForge port of the classic RsGauges mod. Adds stylish analog/digital gauges, switches, and sensors for redstone monitoring. And new Blocks/Items.
body:
# RsGauges (Unofficial NeoForge Port)

![Project Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zLqnXw6d/images/194a5c28e973f38e959cd58d2629bc30db3a3233.png)

This is an unofficial port of the **RsGauges** (Gauges and Switches) mod for **NeoForge 1.21.x**. 

This version is based on the 1.20.1 port by **Waffle**, which in turn is based on the original by **Wile**. Since many players are switching to the latest version of Minecraft, I have updated the mod for the current NeoForge environment.

The mod adds devices to output or measure Redstone power in various styles.

## 🛠 Features

### Switches
* **Buttons & Levers:** Buttons and levers in many designs.
* **Pressure Plates:** Standard pressure plates and shock-sensitive variants (react to falls).
* **Detectors:** Sensors for entities (players, animals, mobs) and block categories (ores, wood, liquids, etc.).
* **Timers:** Daily timers (6:00 AM to 12:00 AM) and interval timers (tick-based).
* **Environment:** Light, rain, and lightning sensors.
* **Specialized:** Switch-Link relays & receivers (wireless transmission), knock sensors, and trapdoor switches.

### Gauges
* **Analog & Digital:** Displays Redstone strength from 0 to 15.
* **Indicators:** LEDs, semaphores, and alarm lights (on/off).
* **Audio:** Alarm sirens and bells.
* **Sensitive Glass:** Glass that emits light or changes color.

### Style Variations
The devices come in various “series” such as *Industrial*, *Retro Industrial*, *Rustic*, *Old Fancy*, or *Glass*. These can be configured to fit perfectly into the respective modpack theme.

## ✨ Special Features
* **Configuration:** All switches can be set to low/high or inverted using a Redstone torch.
* **Wireless:** Most switches can be connected wirelessly using Ender Pearls.
* **Pulse Duration:** The duration of buttons can be configured using Redstone stacks.
* **Colors:** Many switches and indicators can be colored with dyes.

## 📜 Credits & History
* **Original Mod & Sources:** Created by [Wile](https://github.com/stfwi/rsgauges/).
* **1.20.1 Port & Sources:** Created by [Waffle](https://github.com/ialwaysaskedforthat/rsgauges).
* **1.21.x NeoForge Port:** Updated by me (MCFabikDE).

*Note: This is a community project. Please submit support requests for this version only here in the issue tracker, not to the original authors.*

## 💻 Source Code
The complete code for this port is publicly available in accordance with the license terms:
👉 [Click here for the GitHub repository](https://github.com/MCFabik/rsgauges-port)

## 🎥 References (Videos)

* Mod presentation by Debitor (German, 2020): [Watch](https://youtu.be/YO5DByAv71k)
